content.text:
Looking at the image, the track curves gently to the left ahead with the dashed center line visible, and the car appears to be tracking well through the left curve with good road ahead.

Target waypoint: nearest_waypoints[1] + 5 = 44 + 5 = 49
Waypoint 49: (5.3306, 2.7685)
Car position: (6.1699, 2.6375)
Bearing = atan2(2.7685 - 2.6375, 5.3306 - 6.1699) = atan2(0.1310, -0.8393)
= 180 - atan2(0.1310, 0.8393) = 180 - 8.88° = 171.12°
Current heading: 152.96°
Delta = 171.12 - 152.96 = 18.16° → left (positive)
